title: Find My Device - Device list with more then 4 devices
scenario: Find My Device device list becomes scrollable with fade indicator when more than 4 headsets are paired
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Pair and connect more than 4 Poly Bluetooth headsets to the mobile device (e.g., 5 or more).
Navigate to Find My Device from the Home screen or Account menu.
Observe the device list showing all paired headsets.
Attempt to scroll the device list vertically.
expected: The device list in Find My Device expands to show all paired headsets, is scrollable, and displays a slight fade effect at the bottom of the list to indicate scrolling ability.
